title: AutumnPack Addon: Bushy Leaves
description: An addon to InnerToast's Autumnpack that makes leaves more leafier.
body:
# InnerToast's AutumnPack Required!

Autumnpack is a vanilla-like change to make your minecraft world seem all cozy and orange. If you do not already own it, please download here: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack

![A screenshot of a forest with orange and yellow bushy leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6It3y0vT/images/f850d6e0dd1257371d9d7c15c1cd70de65afaf9d.png)

## Official Autumnpack Addon: Bushy Leaves

This addon for [Autumnpack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack)
 allows for leaves to be bushy without having rendering problems.

**The main issue for why this was made is because the foliage colormap was messing with other bushy leaves texture packs.** Thus, I have created an edit of the [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Bushy Leaves to fit with the vanilla-like theme of Autumnpack. **You do not need to download the vanillatweaks version**

---

[![Autumnpack Family of Resource Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60d847c1aeaa2c92c0ea9b7dba65acf6279dea99.png)](https://modrinth.com/collection/QeRymyhi) [![Autumnpack fall vibes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b472cd2309ea512f629b201f41ab4b38432f1f0.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-fall-vibes-only) [![Autumnpack Bushy Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d5aadea77786161b63adb012d7c8d07ffa2fe74.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-bushy) [![Autumnpack Leaf Piles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78aeab53000fc0f7be87e0bf6b81d34936201a97.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/autumnpack-leaf-piles) [![Wilder Wildflowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xYNlkSJk/images/e58507f20061f05dbb2e5fc5a922658ea8706b28.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wilder-wildflowers)
